name: qa-executor
description: Portable QA execution plugin with a qa-executor skill for running or guiding approved QA test cases, enforcing guarded Plane.so parent and sub-work-item QA workflow states with fresh approval required when the Plane state is not Ready to Test, capturing evidence including redacted curl for failed or blocked API cases, producing execution_result JSON with sub-work-item roll-ups when active, requiring source test case status updates or explicit gaps for every executed case, syncing terminal Plane result comments without duplicate review approval sync comments, optional Notion execution reports, and handing structured results to QA reporter and automation agents.

interface.shortDescription: Execute QA cases and capture evidence.
interface.longDescription: QA Executor provides a portable skill for normalizing planner-driven, manual, Plane.so, Notion, spreadsheet, or document test cases, resolving run policy scope, enforcing guarded Plane parent and sub-work-item state workflow from Ready to Test through In Testing, Need Review Test Execute, Need Issue Report, and Ready to Report, requiring fresh approval after reading the actual Plane state when the state is not Ready to Test, executing API, UI, DB, hybrid, or manual-instruction checks, capturing redacted evidence including reproducible curl for failed, blocked, or otherwise problematic API cases, producing execution_result JSON with plane_sub_work_item_executions and parent_rollup when sub-work-items are active, requiring updates or explicit gaps on the original source row/item/section after each executed test case even when a handoff or separate report is requested, embedding or uploading image evidence when supported, discovering Notion links from Plane, creating report pages/documents only when explicitly requested, keeping Plane output summary-only with source or report links, writing one managed Plane review approval comment per execution id and suppressing redundant free-form sync comments, managing sync preflight policy and idempotency, managing OK/NOK execution review, and generating handoffs for qa-reporter and qa-automation.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use qa-executor to run or guide approved QA test cases, optionally sync managed Plane and Notion output with bridge links, and produce an execution result package.
